name: Peaches and Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15-20 oz) sliced peaches, juice reserved,
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first ingredients in a bowl and beat for 2 minutes on medium speed.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased pan.
3. Place the drained peaches over the batter.
4. In another bowl, combine the cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, and peach juice. Beat for 2 minutes on medium speed.
5. Spoon the remaining mixture within 1 inch of the edge of the batter.
6. Mix together the 1 tablespoon sugar and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon in a small bowl.
7. Sprinkle the cinnamon mixture over the entire filling.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes until the crust is golden. The filling will appear soft.
9. Store in the refrigerator.
